summary: High‑quality Healy board tape with natural crowd ambience; solid sound despite lack of detailed show notes.
review: Both reviewers praise the audio, noting that the recording sounds good and clarifying that it is a soundboard tape with built‑in audience mic bleed rather than a true matrix. No specific comments on the musical performance are provided, so the analysis focuses on the clear, well‑mixed source.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are favorable about the sound quality but give no star ratings and contain little information on the performance; rating reflects good recording with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Healy tape recorded from the board with microphones that capture crowd ambience, providing a natural live feel without being a true matrix blend. Reviewers describe the sound as clear and pleasant.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or musical performance were provided in the reviews.
